rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Implementation-level contracts should only use assign for output features or declared auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through variables or outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Guarantee statements should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants.
